payload.answer: I can help rewrite an existing memory, but the update is ambiguous: “He” and “the other one” need to be tied to a specific existing memory and entities before anything durable is changed.
repair_options: Choose the specific existing memory to rewrite, then replace it with: “He prefers the other one.”
Clarify who “he” refers to and what “the other one” refers to, then rewrite the selected memory with the clarified preference.
Cancel the rewrite and do not change any memory.
Keep the existing memory unchanged and add this as a separate candidate note only after clarifying the referenced person and option.
